scope: Doctrine screen staff lesson advisories from previous battle history
mobileQa: skipped; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target

flow: Verify no initial 前戦参謀教訓 card
Enable queued command mode with 停止して予約
Queue 弾性防御, 北へ15度, 敵指揮, 弾薬節約, 阻止射撃
Verify queue summary 一括混線 +1秒
Issue queue with 一括発令
Verify 前戦参謀教訓 recommendation
observations: Initial reset showed no 前戦参謀教訓 card
After command congestion, Doctrine showed 前戦参謀教訓 and 司令部伝達の再訓練
The advisory showed 根拠: 伝令/混線記録 and 推奨方針: 軍制拡張
Clicking 軍制拡張を採用 changed the doctrine row to 採用済み and consumed the available doctrine point
Clicking 兵站偵察に切替 updated 現在の参謀任務 and saved 兵站偵察
Campaign reset removed 前戦参謀教訓 and restored initial doctrine state
